instructions.text: Choose: bullets (any order) or numbers (specific order)

scenarios.text: Things to pack for camping: tent, sleeping bag, flashlight, snacks
How to brush teeth: wet brush, add toothpaste, brush 2 minutes, rinse
scenarios.explanation: Must follow these steps in order

scenarios.text: Favorite pizza toppings: pepperoni, mushrooms, olives, peppers
Steps to tie shoes: make loop, wrap lace around, pull through, tighten

tryAgain.message: Ask: must these be done in order?
